underlying_goal: Complete and merge a Hyperscan shadow mode PR (ENG-242513) by debugging logging issues, fixing failing tests, and resolving PR review comments
friction_detail: GitHub API reply script only read page 1 of 99 comments due to a pagination bug, causing duplicate replies across the 8 threads.
brief_summary: User wanted to finalize a Hyperscan shadow mode PR through debugging, test fixes, and review responses, and largely succeeded despite a pagination bug causing duplicate review replies.
